business.responsibility: Approve the one-contact business scope, customer impact tolerance, and stop/continue decision.
business.approval_criterion: Approves only one controlled contact/cellphone, one conversation, provider real and send real for that contact only.

runtime.responsibility: Own Agent Runtime V2 smoke readiness and stop decision for runtime P0/P1 signals.
runtime.approval_criterion: Confirms preflight remains green and no runtime critical logic changed.

provider.responsibility: Own provider real usage for the single-contact smoke and monitor 429/retry/fallback/latency.
provider.approval_criterion: Confirms provider stability 5/5 and no provider fallback before activation.

db.responsibility: Own DB safety, idempotency, write errors, and post-smoke DB validation.
db.approval_criterion: Confirms tests/agent_runtime pass and duplicate side effects remain zero.

ops.responsibility: Operate the supervised window, monitor stop conditions, and coordinate manual rollback.
ops.approval_criterion: Confirms approved test contact, window, and rollback procedure before activation.

rollback.responsibility: Own rollback SQL execution and validation if any stop condition triggers.
rollback.approval_criterion: Confirms rollback SQL is ready and tested as proposal before activation.

scope_limit: single_contact_live_smoke only; does not approve canary 5 percent, 10 percent, or broad production
